caption: A man wearing a tall, grey, textured wig, glasses, and black headphones sits in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and beige suspenders. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone on a boom arm. Behind him is a wall featuring several framed photographs and clothing displays on mannequins. A logo on the left side of the screen reads "FISTALID PODCAST," and text on the right reads "BOSS TALK JOY." Across the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, slightly adjusting his head and facial expression as if speaking or listening, while the background and equipment remain static. The lighting is bright and consistent, highlighting the details of his eclectic attire and the cluttered backdrop of the studio space.
